text: Good morning! Can you pull up today's calendar and reminders?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Monday, May 05. You have an architecture review at 11 AM, and Lily needs to be picked up from daycare.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Greg is asking for updates on the latest pilot run. Our Twilio integration is throwing 400 rate limit errors during signups. We need to get this sorted before the Baylor pilot starts.
title: Work Update

text: Interesting. I checked the recent logs for that. We should implement a queue-based message broker to buffer SMS delivery rather than hitting Twilio directly. Would you like me to draft a summary for Greg?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Went for a run around the neighborhood. The pediatrician says Lily is growing on track. Need to focus on recovery.
title: Health Update

text: Interesting. I've logged your vitals. Excellent news. The pediatric report is saved in Lily's folder. I'll monitor the sleep metrics tonight.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Jarvis, Sarah attended the parent-teacher conference today. He wants to build a clay model of Saturn for his science project. It is great to see him so engaged.
title: Kids School Update

text: Interesting. That's wonderful. We have clay and foam rings in the garage storage shelves that will be perfect. His curiosity is really impressive.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Updating our financial spreadsheets. Researching the tax benefits of the Texas 529 plan. Need to make a final decision soon.
title: Finance Update

text: Understood. Budget tracking is updated. 529 plans offer great tax-free growth. I've archived the plan details. I've saved the 529 details.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick update: Analyzing the system logs from yesterday's release. I am negotiating my senior PM salary and signing the Vertex Health offer letter. Let's see if we can optimize the code first.
title: Work Update

text: Logged that. That is a common bottleneck. Negotiation is key. Ensure the relocation package covers the Chicago to Frisco move. I'll save this reasoning in our engineering scratchpad.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Just wanted to mention that soldering custom sensors in the garage. Lights will pulse red for X-class solar flares. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Understood. I've indexed the research notes. Connected NOAA weather APIs to your lights. Neat space coding hack, Mike! Remember to get some sleep!
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Lily had a tough time at bedtime tonight. She was throwing broccoli on the floor demanding fruit snacks. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. Bedtime can be a challenge. Toddler nutrition is a constant negotiation. Blending veggies into sauce works well. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: We need to address some engineering concerns with the team. We got beta feedback from clinics suggesting they need secure messaging immediately. Hopefully we can align on this during the stakeholder review.
title: Work Update

text: Here is what I recommend. We should prioritize these clinic requests. Let's create a dedicated sub-task in the CareConnect backlog. I can prep some talking points for your meeting with Anika.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Just wanted to mention that went for a run around the neighborhood. I ran 5 miles but my knee felt tight. Need to focus on recovery.
title: Health Update

text: Sure thing! Staying active is key. Great run! Remember to stretch your hamstrings to help the knee. Keep stretching that knee!
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Ethan came home from Liberty Elementary in a great mood. He is stuck on a math word problem involving division. I'm proud of his curiosity.
title: Kids School Update

text: Understood. He is doing so well. Try using visual diagrams to explain remainders. He'll get it quickly. I'll update the calendar reminder.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Quick update: Looking over our mortgage options. First United Mortgage offered 5.8% with zero points. Financial planning is key for the kids.
title: Finance Update

text: Understood. I can run some projections for you. A rate of 5.8% is a big drop from 6.5%. I'll calculate your savings. I'll archive the documentation.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Jarvis, Prepping for the stakeholder meeting later today. Greg Holloway wants to drop patient onboarding to save time, but Anika thinks it is essential. I want to discuss this with you before the sync.
title: Work Update

text: Interesting. That sounds critical. I suggest a phased rollout. Shipping a basic version of patient onboarding now and iterating later is a good compromise. Let's verify this in the staging environment first.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Jarvis, Spent hours calibrating the telescope mount. Spectrometry data for K2-18b is fascinating. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Your hyperfocus projects are impressive. K2-18b atmospheric profiles are a milestone. I'll fetch companion papers. I can pull more research papers.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: We brought our new golden retriever puppy, Cooper, home today. Lily fell asleep immediately holding her stuffed elephant. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. Bedtime can be a challenge. A calm routine makes all the difference. Nice contrast to the tantrums. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, logging today's journal. Lots of communication with Greg and Anika today. Dealt with bedtime tantrums but made it through. CareConnect prep is moving along. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Logged that for you. See you in the morning, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
